CRITICAL.name: data_freshness_breach
CRITICAL.message: The pipeline data is stale and exceeds the 24-hour freshness threshold.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the data freshness issue immediately.

CRITICAL.name: quality_threshold_breach
CRITICAL.message: Data quality has fallen below the 99.9% threshold, impacting data integrity.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Identify and rectify the data quality issues as a priority.

CRITICAL.name: row_count_out_of_bounds
CRITICAL.condition: Row count is outside the 17-25 range
CRITICAL.message: The row count is outside the expected range of 17 to 25 rows.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Check for data completeness and address any discrepancies.

WARNING.name: runtime_approaching_limit
WARNING.condition: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit
WARNING.message: The pipeline runtime is nearing the 120-minute threshold.
WARNING.recommended_action: Monitor the pipeline runtime and optimize if necessary to avoid breaching the limit.

WARNING.name: quality_slightly_below_threshold
WARNING.condition: Data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%
WARNING.message: Data quality is slightly below the 99.9% threshold.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the cause of the slight drop in data quality.

WARNING.name: merchant_failure_spike
WARNING.condition: One merchant's failure rate spikes above 30%
WARNING.message: A merchant's failure rate has spiked above the 30% threshold.
WARNING.recommended_action: Assess the merchant's data processing and resolve any issues promptly.

INFO.name: new_payment_method_detected
INFO.condition: A new payment method is detected in the data
INFO.message: A new payment method has been detected in the data.
INFO.recommended_action: Verify the new payment method and update the system if necessary.

INFO.name: row_count_near_bounds
INFO.condition: Daily row count is near the bounds
INFO.message: The daily row count is near the lower or upper bounds of 17 to 25.
INFO.recommended_action: Monitor the row count to ensure it remains within the expected range.
